'''pamogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swainling|swainling]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-m-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swainling|swainling]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pamogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæmegeth|pæmegeth]] || [[word:pæmegej|pæmegej]] || [[word:pæmegesh|pæmegesh]] || [[word:pæmege|pæmege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pamomogoth|pamomogoth]] || [[word:pamomogoj|pamomogoj]] || [[word:pamomogosh|pamomogosh]] || [[word:pamomogo|pamomogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pamogoth|pamogoth]] || [[word:pamogoj|pamogoj]] || [[word:pamogosh|pamogosh]] || [[word:pamogo|pamogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pamofgoth|pamofgoth]] || [[word:pamofgoj|pamofgoj]] || [[word:pamofgosh|pamofgosh]] || [[word:pamofgof|pamofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pamogotho|pamogotho]] || [[word:pamogojo|pamogojo]] || [[word:pamogosho|pamogosho]] || [[word:pamogoko|pamogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pamogoth|pamogoth]] || [[word:pamogoj|pamogoj]] || [[word:pamogosh|pamogosh]] || [[word:pamogo|pamogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pamogothol|pamogothol]] || [[word:pamogojol|pamogojol]] || [[word:pamogoshol|pamogoshol]] || [[word:pamogokol|pamogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pamogothotho|pamogothotho]] || [[word:pamogojojo|pamogojojo]] || [[word:pamogoshosho|pamogoshosho]] || [[word:pamogoko|pamogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pamogothon|pamogothon]] || [[word:pamogojon|pamogojon]] || [[word:pamogoshon|pamogoshon]] || [[word:pamogokon|pamogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pamogothoro|pamogothoro]] || [[word:pamogojoro|pamogojoro]] || [[word:pamogoshoro|pamogoshoro]] || [[word:pamogokoro|pamogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
